title: 8 Pcs Dishwasher Basket Wheel, Lower Basket Wheel Replacement for Bosch Kenmore Siemens Neff, Universal Dishwasher Lower Rack Cutlery Basket Wheel, Replaces Part Numbers 165314, 420198
features: Compatible with Multiple Brands: These dishwasher basket wheels are designed to fit for Bosch, Kenmore, Siemens, Neff dishwashers. They replace part numbers 165314, 00165314, 420198, 00420198, 423232, and more, offering a fit for your dishwasher.

Premium ABS Material: Crafted from ABS plastic, these dishwasher wheels are designed for strength and durability. They are built to endure the demands of everyday dishwasher use, ensuring a long service life and reliable performance.

Easy Installation: Installing these lower basket wheels is quick and simple. Each wheel comes with a safety clip for secure attachment. Just remove the old wheels and snap the new ones into place—no tools required for installation.

Perfect for Lower Dishwashers Baskets: These universal dishwasher wheels are designed specifically for the lower baskets of dishwashers. Whether you're replacing damaged wheels or upgrading your existing ones, these parts ensure smooth and effective use for cutlery baskets.

Value Pack: This pack includes 8 dishwasher wheels for Bosch Kenmore Siemens Neff, enough to replace all the wheels in your dishwasher lower basket. It offers excellent value for money and ensures that your dishwasher operates smoothly.
description: The 8 Pcs Dishwasher Basket Wheels offer a convenient and cost-effective solution for replacing damaged or worn-out wheels in your dishwasher’s lower basket. Compatible with Bosch, Kenmore, Siemens, and Neff dishwashers, these wheels are designed to fit seamlessly with various models, replacing part numbers such as 165314, 420198, and more. Made from premium ABS plastic, these replacement wheels are built to last. ABS material provides superior strength and durability, ensuring long-term use even under the high demands of frequent dishwasher cycles. The wheels are designed to withstand the rigors of daily use and help maintain the functionality of your dishwasher basket. With easy installation, these wheels can be quickly and securely attached with the included safety clips. Simply remove the old, damaged wheels and snap the new ones into place without the need for tools. This 8-piece set is designed to fit the lower baskets of your dishwasher, ensuring smooth movement and an efficient cleaning process. These replacement wheels are the perfect solution for restoring your dishwasher’s mobility. Whether you're replacing a few broken wheels or upgrading all of them, this pack provides great value and ensures your dishwasher basket functions like new. Package Includes: 8 x dishwasher wheels for Bosch Kenmore Siemens Neff (Grey)
